name: verify
description: Re-derive Society Z's own hash-chained record from raw entries and report whether the chain is intact, with no external service.

path.description: path to a record.jsonl file (default: record.jsonl in cwd)

entries.description: already-loaded entry objects, used instead of reading a file

head.description: hash of the last entry, or null if empty

valid.description: true if every entry recomputes correctly and links to the one before it

broken_at.description: index of the first broken entry, or null if valid
